channel.title: Roland Research Briefings
channel.description: Private synthetic audio briefings generated from Roland research notes.
channel.itunes:author: Roland

item.title: Kevin Kelly — Research Briefing
item.description: Synthetic narration based on Roland research notes; not the person’s real voice.
